imageUpload.hint: PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF up to {max}MB
imageUpload.invalidType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF.
imageUpload.uploadFailed: Could not upload the image. Try again.

hero.subtitle: What if anyone could challenge anyone, and the victories lived on Nostr forever?

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Create challenges, compete for sats, and earn badges that live on your Nostr identity.
howItWorks.step1Description: Set the rules, duration, and fund it with sats. Your arena is published to Nostr for anyone to discover.
howItWorks.step2Description: Enter challenges, submit your proof of victory, and track your progress.
howItWorks.step3Description: Conquer challenges to earn sats and NIP-58 badges on your Nostr identity. Your victories are celebrated across the network.

about.title: The BitByBit Family
about.description: BitByBit believes effort deserves bitcoin. We started rewarding kids for habits. Now, the arena rewards everyone who dares to compete.

partners.title: Partners
partners.subtitle: Building the future of Nostr, together.

support.title: Support BitByBit
support.subtitle: Open source and community-driven. Help us keep building.

zapModal.title: Zap the devs
zapModal.description: Support the BitByBit team with a Lightning zap.
zapModal.success: Zap sent! Thanks for the support!
zapModal.error: Failed to send zap. Try again.
zapModal.errorNoAddress: Lightning address is not configured yet.
zapModal.errorInvalidAddress: Could not resolve Lightning address. It may not be active yet.
zapModal.noWebln: No Lightning wallet found. Copy the invoice manually.

login.title: Sign in with Nostr
login.subtitle: Choose how to connect your Nostr identity to create and join challenges.
login.extensionDescription: Nostr WoT, Alby, nos2x or another extension
login.no_extension: No Nostr extension detected in this browser.
login.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
login.nsecWarning: Pasting your private key in any website is risky. Your key will only be used to sign a login event and will NOT be stored or sent to any server.
login.nsecInvalidKey: Invalid key. Use nsec1 format or 64-character hex.
login.connectQrAlt: QR code to connect with Nostr
login.connectError: Connection failed. Check the URL and try again.
login.connectApproveInSigner: Approve the connection in your signer app
login.connectSlowHint: Still waiting? Open your signer app (Amber, nsec.app...) and approve the request.
login.createIdentityDescription: Generate a fresh Nostr identity in one click
login.createdIntro: Save your private key below. This is the only way to access your account.
login.createdWarning: If you lose this key, you lose your account. There is no recovery.
login.createdExtensionTitle: For the best experience, install an extension
login.createdExtensionBody: Without an extension your key lives only in memory: if you reload the page you'll need to sign in again to publish new Nostr events.
login.nsecExtensionBody: For security and session continuity: an extension keeps your key protected and your session alive across reloads. Pasting your nsec here leaves it in memory, so you'll have to sign in again every time you reload.
login.createdAckLabel: I've saved my key and I understand there is no recovery

reSignIn.title: Unlock your key
reSignIn.intro: Your session is still active, but we need to sign this Nostr event with your key. Reconnect your signer to continue.
reSignIn.nsecInvalid: Invalid key. Use nsec1 format or 64-character hex.
reSignIn.mismatch: This key doesn't match the account you signed in with.
reSignIn.authFailed: We couldn't validate the signature. Try again.

signerRequired.title: You need to unlock your key
signerRequired.body: Your session is still active, but we can't sign new Nostr events until you reconnect your signer.
signerRequired.anonBody: To create or join challenges you need a Nostr identity. Use your extension, a remote signer, your nsec, or create a new account.

suggested.challengeCreated: I just launched a challenge on BitByBit Arena: {title} 🏆 Join in 👉 {link}
suggested.challengeJoined: I joined the {title} challenge on BitByBit Arena. Dare to join? 👉 {link}
suggested.challengeCompleted: I just completed the {title} challenge on BitByBit Arena! 🎉 {link}
suggested.badgeReceived: I earned the {badge} badge by completing {title} on BitByBit Arena 🏅 {link}

explore.title: Explore Challenges
explore.empty: No challenges yet. Be the first to create one!
explore.emptyFiltered: No challenges found with these filters.

createChallenge.title: Create Challenge

name.text: A short, clear title that says what the challenge is about.

description.text: Spell out the rules, what counts as completion, and any constraints.
description.example: E.g., Read at least 20 minutes every day for 30 straight days.

dates.text: When the challenge starts and ends. Optional if it's open-ended.

type.text: How the challenge is structured: one task, daily streak, competition, etc.
type.example: E.g., "Streak" if you need to do something every day

tags.text: Up to 10 tags to help people discover your challenge. Lowercase, hyphens, no spaces.

verification.text: You can pick more than one method. Participants must satisfy every method you choose.

checkpoints.text: Split the challenge into sub-tasks. Sequential forces an order, parallel allows any order.

prize.text: Total prize in sats. Distributed among the winners according to the chosen mode.

rewardZapMode.text: Choose how sats are split among people who complete the challenge. Pick the mode that matches your challenge.
rewardZapMode.example: E.g., Podium for contests, Split for participation challenges

badgeName.text: Name of the NIP-58 badge winners receive on their Nostr identity.

badgeImage.text: Upload an image for the badge. We store it on a Blossom server (content-addressed by SHA-256) so any Nostr client can display it.
badgeImage.example: PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF up to 2MB

createChallenge.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the challenge, rules, and how to verify...

typeDescriptions.streak: Repeat something every day for a fixed count.
typeDescriptions.competition: Multiple participants compete for the best results.
typeDescriptions.race: First one to reach the goal wins.
typeDescriptions.creative: Creative work judged by the creator or the community.

createChallenge.tagsHint: Up to 10 tags. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.

verificationDescriptions.creator_approval: The creator reviews and approves each submitted proof.
verificationDescriptions.nostr_action: The participant must like a specific Nostr event.
verificationDescriptions.nostr_hashtag: The participant must post with a specific hashtag.

createChallenge.verificationEmptyError: Select at least one verification method.
createChallenge.nostrActionTargetPlaceholder: 64-character hex id of the event participants must like
createChallenge.nostrActionTargetError: Event id must be a 64-character hex string
createChallenge.nostrHashtagError: Hashtag must be 2-50 characters (letters, numbers, underscore)

checkpointModeDescriptions.none: The challenge is completed with a single proof.
checkpointModeDescriptions.sequential: Sub-tasks must be completed in order.
checkpointModeDescriptions.parallel: Sub-tasks can be completed in any order.

createChallenge.checkpointsHint: Split the challenge into sub-tasks. Each checkpoint is verified independently.
createChallenge.checkpointsEmptyError: Add at least one checkpoint or select "No checkpoints"
createChallenge.checkpointTitleError: Checkpoint {index}: title must be at least 3 characters
createChallenge.checkpointTargetError: Checkpoint {index}: event id must be a 64-character hex string
createChallenge.checkpointHashtagError: Checkpoint {index}: hashtag must be 2-50 characters (letters, numbers, underscore)

rewardZapModeDescriptions.first_to_complete: The first person to complete takes the whole pot. Best for races and speedruns.
rewardZapModeDescriptions.split: Everyone who completes shares the pot equally. Best for participation-style challenges.
rewardZapModeDescriptions.tiered: Top three finishers split 50% / 30% / 20%. Best for ranked contests.

createChallenge.publishZapGoalLabel: Publish a Zap Goal (NIP-75) on Nostr so others can fund the prize
createChallenge.zapGoalSkippedNoSigner: The challenge was created but we couldn't publish the Zap Goal: your Nostr signer isn't active. You can publish it later from the challenge page.
createChallenge.zapGoalPublishFailed: The challenge was created but we couldn't publish the Zap Goal to the relays. Try again later.
createChallenge.createFailed: Could not create the challenge. Try again.
createChallenge.signingFailed: Could not sign the challenge event. Check your Nostr signer and try again.
createChallenge.needSigner: You need to unlock your Nostr key before creating a challenge.

challenge.creatorJoinWarning: As creator you'll compete alongside participants. Any prize share you win stays with you — no payout to yourself.
challenge.leaveChallengeConfirm: Your progress will be lost. If you rejoin later you'll start from zero.
challenge.verifyLikeInstructions: Like the target event from your Nostr client, then press verify. We'll look for your kind 7 reaction on the relays.
challenge.proofNotFound: We couldn't find your like on the relays yet. Try again in a few seconds.
challenge.checkpointModeSequential: Complete checkpoints in order. Each one unlocks the next.
challenge.checkpointError: Could not complete the checkpoint. Try again.
challenge.proofTooShort: Proof must be at least 5 characters.
challenge.rewardInstructions: Total prize: {amount} sats. Mode: {mode}. Clicking pays each winner by signing a zap request and paying with your Lightning wallet.
challenge.rewardRetainedByCreator: {amount} sats retained by creator (you won as your own participant — no self-payout).
challenge.rewardAllRetained: All winning shares are retained by you — nothing to pay out.
challenge.rewardResultContent: Challenge complete! Congratulations to all participants in {title}.
challenge.republishResultHint: We couldn't publish the Challenge Result event on Nostr the last time. Try again to announce the winners.
challenge.republishResultFailed: Could not publish the result event. Try again.
challenge.rewardError: Could not pay the reward. Try again.
challenge.rewardNoWebln: No WebLN-compatible Lightning wallet detected. Install a WebLN provider (Alby, Mutiny, etc.) to pay winners from the browser.
challenge.zapNoAddress: This user hasn't set a Lightning address on their Nostr profile.
challenge.zapFailed: Could not prepare the zap. Try again.
challenge.zapInvoiceHint: Scan the QR or copy the invoice to send {amount} sats from any Lightning wallet.
challenge.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

myChallenges.empty: No challenges yet. Explore and join one!
myChallenges.emptyCreated: You haven't created any challenges yet.
myChallenges.emptyJoined: You haven't joined any challenges yet.
myChallenges.emptyAchievements: No badges yet. Complete a challenge to earn your first one.
myChallenges.acceptSuccess: Badge added to your Nostr profile
myChallenges.acceptFailed: Could not publish your profile badges. Try again.

story.title: The BitByBit Story
story.p1: BitByBit started during the FOUNDATIONS hackathon by La Crypta in March 2026. The idea was simple: what if kids could earn real bitcoin for building good habits? That became **BitByBit Habits** — a family habit tracker where sponsors reward kids with sats via Lightning Network.
story.p2: The name "BitByBit" reflects the philosophy: small consistent actions, stacked over time, create big results. Like stacking sats, like building blocks.
story.p3: For the second La Crypta hackathon (Nostr theme), we took the same idea — real rewards for real effort — and brought it to the open Nostr network. **BitByBit Arena** lets anyone create public challenges, compete with others, and earn badges and sats. No families, no permissions — just the open protocol.
story.p4: Both projects share the same codebase quality, the same team, and the same belief: Bitcoin should reward action, not just speculation.

anix.name: Anix
anix.bio: Keeps the code clean and the team on track. Probably debugging at 3am.

llopo.name: Llopo
llopo.role: The bitcoiner of the family. Licensed vibe coder
llopo.bio: If it doesn't run on Lightning, it doesn't run. Certified in vibes-driven development.

wander.name: Wander
wander.role: Licensed in 'My grandma can use it' & tester
wander.bio: If Wander can't break it, nobody can. Chief UX critic and bug whisperer.

leon.name: Leon
leon.bio: Can sell ice to penguins. Turns our spaghetti ideas into 3-minute magic.

lacrypta.title: La Crypta & Hackathons
lacrypta.description: Both BitByBit projects were born at La Crypta hackathons — a Bitcoin community in Argentina that organizes events to build on Lightning and Nostr.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: BitByBit is fully open source. All code is public on GitHub.
openSource.contribute: Contribute or open an issue — every bit helps.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This arena vanished. The challenge you were looking for may have ended or the link is broken.

settings.title: Settings
settings.syncHint: Sync pulls your latest kind:0 metadata from relays into Arena. Publish signs a new kind:0 with your edits and pushes it back — fields Arena doesn't manage (nip05, website, banner…) are preserved from the version already on relays.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Removes your data from BitByBit Arena. Your Nostr identity and any events published to relays cannot be deleted from here — we don't control those.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmBody: This will remove your profile, progress, and badges from BitByBit Arena. Your Nostr identity (public key) and any events published to relays remain untouched — we don't control those. If you sign in again with the same key, your account will be reactivated.
